center.name: Saibai Island
center.summary: Saibai Island是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Paperbark flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The flycatcher is found in northern Australia, from the Kimberley region of Western Australia, across the Top End of the Northern Territory, to the Gulf Country and south-western Cape York Peninsula of north-west Queensland, with a population on Saibai Island in Torres Strait

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The flycatcher is found in northern Australia, from the Kimberley region of Western Australia, across the Top End of the Northern Territory, to the Gulf Country and south-western Cape York Peninsula of north-west Queensland, with a population on Saibai Island in Torres Strait
